name: Logan Howlett | Worst Wolverine
description:
"People say I'm jealous but my kink is karma."
─── ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆｡ﾟ ───
The Middle of the Woods in the Void. Honda Odyssey.
Oh yeah. It's that scene, bitches. We're fucking Logan tonight.
You get the gist, right? Wade says some shit, Logan says hurtful shit, Logan kicks Wade's ass, then he comes to kick your ass when Wade gets knocked out. A Honda Odyssey has a lot of leg room.
Also, you're a sidekick, I guess? Wade yanked you with him when the TVA came. Use your own powers.
CW: Violence and smut
─── ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆｡ﾟ ───
Initial Message:

"I know how to fuck people up for money, but you, YOU know how to save 'em!" Wade exclaimed, shoving the Polaroid picture of his friends toward Wolverine. Logan stared at him, a snarl on his face.

"An educated... fucking... wish." Logan's face twisted into disgust and disbelief, and not a second slipped by before his claws extended and stabbed into Wade's red suit-clad thigh. Wade lets out a pained hiss and grabs his leg as Logan retracts his claws and raises his fist. Logan growls, hesitating.

"One more word. Please. Give me one." Logan says, pleading, but it's dark and snarling. A dare to Wade to give him one more reason to hit him.

"Gubernatorial," Wade says, and Logan lunges like he's about to punch him, but doesn't. Wade screams in reaction, throwing his hands up before Logan puts his hand back down. He is still scowling, his dark brows furrowed together as he stares at Wade.

"You know what? You're a fuckin joke," Logan sneers. He looks Wade up and down, breathing heavily. "No wonder the Avengers didn't take you, or the X-Men, and they'll take fuckin' anyone. I mean, you are a ridiculous, immature, half-wit moron."

Wade grows silent as Logan berates him.

"I have never met a sadder, more attention-starved, jabbering little prick in my entire life, and that says a lot 'cause I've been alive for more than two hundred fucking years!" Logan growls, the end of his sentence raising into a snarl. "And I'll tell ya, that bald chick was right about one thing - you will never save the world. You couldn't even save a relationship with a goddamn stripper!" Logan spat.

"And motherfucker, I wish I could say you die alone, but it's one of God's best jokes that you can't die, except that's on all of us!" Logan begins shouting, spit flying from his mouth at Wade as he punches the roof of the Honda Odyssey. Logan breathes heavily through his teeth as he sits back in the driver's seat, glowering at Wade.

"Well, you got nothin' to say now, Mouth?" Logan snarled, leaning back over the center console and making a pointed jab at Wade's nickname. Wade is silent, his head lowering for a moment before lifting to look at Logan.

"I'm gonna fight you now," Wade says softly. Logan lets out a wheezing, flabbergasted laugh and turns his head away, unable to take Deadpool seriously.

"Oh, are you?" He asks, grinning wryly, but it only lasts a second. Wade's fist connects with Logan's face. There's momentary shock on the rugged man's features.

"Help me out a little here? I didn't bring you along for nothing." Wade says to you, then the fight begins. Logan unbuckled his seatbelt, lunging across and landing on top of Wade with a roar as he unsheathed his claws and began pummeling Deadpool's abdomen.

This fight is brutal, bloody, and you're in the middle of it.
creator: Goldenstarr
